name: my-claude-plugins
description: Team plugin marketplace for Claude Code extensions

metadata.description: Curated collection of Claude Code plugins for team use

plugins.name: ripvec
plugins.description: Semantic code + document search + knowledge-graph skill index. Model2Vec static bi-encoder (potion-base-32M) + TinyBERT-L-2 cross-encoder reranker, CPU-only. 21 tree-sitter grammars, 26 extensions, MCP + LSP server. 4.1.13: fix MCP project-root default — server honors CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR, plugin shim no longer cd's into the install dir; tool calls without explicit `root` now target the user's session repo, not the plugin cache. 4.1.12: focus-PageRank recalibrated (α 0.15→0.35). 4.1.10: knowledge-graph orchestration layer — ripvec-orientation hub, intent-routing lookup, 5 orientation hubs, 7 language recipe skills, 7 new commands (/orient /cartograph /blast-radius /dead-code /audit /teach /trace). 4.1.0: find_dead_code. 4.0.1: token_budget for get_repo_map. 4.0: LSP-shaped composability.

plugins.name: tracemeld
plugins.description: LLM-native performance profiling — import CPU profiles from any language (Rust, Go, Python, TypeScript, C/C++), find bottlenecks, detect waste patterns, and navigate to hot code via LSP. Includes 12 MCP tools, 6 language profiling skills, and a performance analysis agent.
